_meta.calibration_source: ResumeAdapter Q1-2026 (10,000 scans, median=62, mean=64.3), CVCraft 2026 industry data (tech avg=65), ResumeOptimizerPro 2026 dataset (pre-optimisation avg=47 JD-match only)
notes: p50 anchors are calibrated to the composite score distribution of real Indian SWE resumes at each seniority band.
Junior/mid shifted +4/+3 pts vs prior version — the prior values were too low, making average candidates appear above-average.
Staff/senior_em/director shifted -4/-3/-3 pts — the prior values were too high for the management track, unfairly placing average competitive resumes below median.
Senior p50 unchanged at 63 — accurately matches observed composite distribution for 7-12 YOE profiles.
p90 anchor reflects top ~10-12% of optimised resumes per ResumeOptimizerPro 2026 data (85+ = 11-15% of resumes).
_meta.refresh_cadence: Review every 6 months. Re-anchor against corpus once n > 500 runs.
